sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46035" key="e(wlonekro/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑωλο-νεκρός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen> (cf. sq. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl>). <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὁ πρὸ πολλοῦ τεθνηκώς</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
